commitResults.messageTitle: Added HomePage.java for basic homepage ui. Currently the button only opens a simple dialogue for debugging purposes. Edited Minesweeper.java to add import for javafx.application.Application, and changed main() to lead to the application launch

commitResults.messageBody: Implement HomePage UI

commitResults.messageTitle: Created GamePage file. Added getBox() to get the gameboard for UI.
Added a game page of 10x10 buttons that can be revealed and works with the game logic Added .gradle/build/ to gitignore, and removed tracking files

Edited floodfill method in gameboard to also take account of diagonals Edited gameboard to show win and lose game alerts. Issue: Currently the win alert does not show when manually winning the game since the gameboard is reset before display is updated
Added functionality to continue button. Edited GameBoard such that resetGameboard is called at UI-level instead. Added timer by integrating CustomTimer in the GamePage UI

Refactored Gameboard.java by adding enum for board state (safe, bomb, win). Added a method in GamePage.java to handle first click - when the first box is clicked, timer will start and the board keeps generating until the first tile is not a bomb.

Refactor CustomTimer to show time in milliseconds for storage and leaderboard purposes. Edited Storage to take account for the milliseconds Edited handleWin in GamePage to fix a bug where the timer label lags or does not match the win time

Fixed a bug where the losing time in the timer at GamePage does not match the timer stated in the Losing box. Added revealAllBombs method on Gameboard to show the current gameboard with bombs revealed. Edited the handleLose in GamePage to display the bomb location from revealAllBombs
Fixing warnigs from VS Code by adding final in the constructors. Fixing VS Code warning at Minesweeper.java by putting Scanner scanner inside a try block.

commitResults.messageBody: Implement GamePage UI and Integration with the Game Logic

commitResults.messageTitle: Refactor CustomTimer to add zeroTime() -> make the time 0, and update the restartTime() to use zerotime(). This is applied to fix a bug in gamepage.java where there is a 1 milli offset time when resetting the board after win/lose. Edited gamepage.java to start with the correct millis of time when continuing a game. Edited the handlewin() method to show a message box with entry for leaderboard. Added loadLeaderboard(), addEntry(), and sortLeaderboardByTime() in Storage to handle loading the leaderboard, adding entries to the leaderboard, and sort the leaderboard by time respectively. Added the initial imports to LeaderboardPage.java to prepare for the Leaderboard page ui Added the WinPage class to prepare moving the handleWin() message box under gamepage.java to a new winpage class for readability.
Added LeaderboardPage to show the leaderboard when the leaderboard in the HomePage is clicked
Fixed gradlew.bat as it has missing CLASSPATH Added shadowJar in build.gradle Added Launcher.java to launch the homepage ui

commitResults.messageTitle: Edited hint count logic, using countdown instead of countup. Changed Hint logic to show a random safe cell when clicked. Renamed the old giveHint to giveShield, for future implementations and gimmicks Edited HintCommand to output accordingly.

Added Home button in GamePage, and put the header UI in a class to make it more editable. Fixed timer starting not at zero when starting a new game by editing restartGameboard(): adding stoptime() and zerotime() after restarttime()

commitResults.messageBody: Implement hint system, clean up header UI and fix timer

commitResults.messageTitle: Added basic help window that has a textbox and a home button. The textbox text is loaded by Storade loadHelp() from help.txt in data. Added help.txt exception in gitignore
Moved help feature under ResourceManager instead of Storage. This is to differentiate UI related resources and game logic data storage.
Fix timer starting when winpage is closed, when it should only start after isfirstclick=False Removed redundant lines from Gameboard

Fixed when home button is pressed in gamepage, if isFirstClick=true, the board should be reset and continue button disabled Fixed when WinPage opens Leaderboard, if leaderboard is closed using the x button, the gamepage have not reset
commitResults.messageBody:
Added onClose and showAndWait to LeaderboardPage to allow the winpage's onClose to run only after leaderboard page is closed
This allows the winning board to remain visible until after leaderboard page is closed

Edited Leaderboard button in HomePage to account for the new leaderboard page onclose.

commitResults.messageTitle: Removed uneccessary lines from gameboard and storage. Added safeguard at CustomTimer pauseAndStopTime() to check if timer is running before stopping it. Removed unecessary timer=new timer in startTime()

Added isFirstClick to hintBtn in GamePage so that the timer starts when a hint is used

commitResults.messageBody:

2. Initialise gameboard with each cell having a Box Object

3. Allow printing of gameboard

1. game.txt : Shows F if Flag, R if Reveal, N if Not Revealed

2. solution.txt : shows bomb placements and numberOfAdjacentBombs for each box

3. Handle exception where game.txt / solution.txt file is empty

commitResults.messageBody:
1. Redirect all responses through Ui class

2. CheckForWin function: Compare solution.txt and current gameboard
Integrate Ui & Check for Win Function

Bug: Unflag not working as unflag was registered as a flag

Fix: Swap positions of Flag and Unflag in Parser

Use hint.txt to store the number of hints given thus far

Only max 3 hints given for each gameboard (even after closing and reopening the program)
Integrate Max 3 Hints Functionality

1. Fix Bug where selecting (Back to Home Button) after discovering a bomb would not restart the Gameboard

2. Add (Clear Board) function to clear all existing game solutions after a gameplay ends

3. Ensure that (Continue Game) is greyed out when there are no existing gameplays

(Continue Game) in Home Page is greyed out when:

* Player finds a bomb and goes back to home page

* Player wins, enters leaderboard and goes back to home page

* Player wins, closes leaderboard and goes back to home page (error handling)
Integrate Clear Board
